command:
bash -lc "set -euo pipefail
printf "## pwd\n"; pwd
printf "\n## git status --short\n"; git status --short
printf "\n## scoped status\n"; git status --short -- packages/verification packages/cli packages/artifacts packages/orchestration package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml pnpm-lock.yaml tsconfig.json turbo.json docs .github scripts || true
printf "\n## validation-owned roots inventory\n"; find .vibe/work/I-09A-verification-runner-core-evidence-routing/post-fix-validation-evidence .vibe/work/I-09A-verification-runner-core-evidence-routing/post-fix-validation-command-log -type f 2>/dev/null | sort
printf "\n## protected roots current hashes\n"; for p in package.json turbo.json pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml; do if [ -f "$p" ]; then shasum -a 256 "$p"; else printf "MISSING %s\n" "$p"; fi; done
"
argv:
set -euo pipefail
printf "## pwd
"; pwd
printf "
## git status --short
"; git status --short
printf "
## scoped status
"; git status --short -- packages/verification packages/cli packages/artifacts packages/orchestration package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml pnpm-lock.yaml tsconfig.json turbo.json docs .github scripts || true
printf "
## validation-owned roots inventory
"; find .vibe/work/I-09A-verification-runner-core-evidence-routing/post-fix-validation-evidence .vibe/work/I-09A-verification-runner-core-evidence-routing/post-fix-validation-command-log -type f 2>/dev/null | sort
printf "
## protected roots current hashes
"; for p in package.json turbo.json pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml; do if [ -f "$p" ]; then shasum -a 256 "$p"; else printf "MISSING %s
" "$p"; fi; done
